feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: FIORI logon to app with default creditials
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have such a special case, business want to use small confirmation app without logon.

it is a simple app where is only possible to push button and confirm that the text was readed and it does not matter who did.

we created a technical user and in transaction SICF - > tab "logon data"  for Odata and for UI5 app set this user and password, so the app should be always logon with this user without requesting any other logon information.

But when we call the app the logon page occurs.

when we try to test just the OData service by GetEntitySet. we receive also the pop-up window for logon data, but in case we cancel the pop-up we can see the technical user is logon and the service return the data from Method GetEntitySet.

it seems like there is some higher lever authentification requiring the logon data.

do you have any idea what should be swiched on/off or should be set to avoid the logon pop-up or logon page?

entry.title: Dynamic Column Headers for Parent and Child Rows in sap.ui.table.TreeTable
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am working with sap.ui.table.TreeTable in SAP UI5 and need to display hierarchical data where parent rows and child rows have different column headers.

Does SAP UI5 officially support different column headers for parent and child nodes in TreeTable?
If not, is there an alternative approach within SAP’s recommended best practices?


Thank you!

Regards,

Preeti

entry.title: Table Grouping in Fiori Elements
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm developing an application using fiori elements, with a template list page and object page.

I would like to group the table in the object page by Storage Location. It would be a regular grouping, without aggregation. I've tried using CDS annotations and XML annotations, without success.

In the annotation target, I've tried with the entity itself and also its container.

<Annotations Target="SAP__self.Container/zz_pv_stock_zite_assets">
                <Annotation Term="UI.PresentationVariant">
                    <Record Type="UI.PresentationVariantType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="GroupBy">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>StorageLocation</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Visualizations">
                            <Collection>
                                <AnnotationPath>@UI.LineItem</AnnotationPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>

            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.zz_pv_stock_zite_assetsType">
                <Annotation Term="UI.PresentationVariant">
                    <Record Type="UI.PresentationVariantType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="GroupBy">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>StorageLocation</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Visualizations">
                            <Collection>
                                <AnnotationPath>@UI.LineItem</AnnotationPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>

It doesn't work, however the grouping works when I do directly in the app using the engine icon.

What could be missing?

Thank you in advance, Rogerio

entry.title: Adding New Field and Value Help to Standard Fiori Application
entry.content:
Hello,
I am trying to add a new field with a value help to the standard fiori application F2358 'Monitor Purchase Order Items'.

The odata service is created with segw (sadl) and i could identify the cds-view i need to extend (C_PurchaseOrderItemMoni)

I simply created a CDS-View Extension to add the field to the service.
As far as i knew i could not use the standard application "Custom Fields and Logic" , because you cannot add fields which are filled, only new "empty" fields?

This worked fine and i could already use the new field within the app.

And the new field was visible in the odata service

Now i needed to add a Value Help for the new field, therefore i added a value help to the cds-view extensions and created a custom value help.

But the value help is not working 

Is it even possible to add a value help to a standard fiori app?
best regards

entry.title: Event onSelectionChanged from InteractiveDonutChart doesn't work
entry.content:
Hi,

I don't understand why the event onSelectionChanged from the class 

sap.suite.ui.microchart.InteractiveDonutChart isn't called when I click on any segment.
It's been called within a custom section, in a fiori element application.
The method onSectionLoaded is correctly called, but  onSelectionChanged don't. 
When I run the application, the console doesn't bring any errors, neither in the network tab.
 

 

<core:FragmentDefinition 
	xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" 
	xmlns="sap.m"
	xmlns:microchart="sap.suite.ui.microchart" >

	<HBox>

		<microchart:InteractiveDonutChart
			id="idDonutChart"
			selectionChanged="onSelectionChanged"
			press="onSelectionChanged"
			selectionEnabled="true"
			displayedSegments="8"
			segments="{_lgort}">
			<microchart:segments>
				<microchart:InteractiveDonutChartSegment
					value="{QuantityStock}"
					label="{= ${StorageLocation} + ' - ' + ${StorageLocationTxt} }" />
			</microchart:segments>
		</microchart:InteractiveDonutChart>

	</HBox>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

 

 

 

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/m/MessageToast"
], function(MessageToast) {
    'use strict';

    return {
        onPress: function(oEvent) {
            MessageToast.show("onPress");
            debugger;
        },

        onInit: function(oEvent){
            MessageToast.show("onInit");
            debugger;
        },

        onSectionLoaded: function(oSection){
            MessageToast.show("onSectionLoaded");
            debugger;
        },

        onSelectionChanged: function (oSection) {
            debugger;
		},

        press: function(oEvent){
            debugger;
        }
    };
});

entry.title: FIORI Elements: Missing UI Message from Backend
entry.content:
Hi, 

i have created FIORI Elements App with BOPF as Backend. 

I implemented custom Actions, but triggered Error Messages from Backend are not displayed in FIORI but are visible in Network Console.

Backend Implementation:

 

  METHOD /bobf/if_frw_action~execute.

    DATA: usr_scenario_table TYPE Zt_pmc_usr_scen_ass.
    io_read->retrieve(
      EXPORTING
        iv_node                 = is_ctx-node_key
        it_key                  = it_key
      IMPORTING
        et_data                 = usr_scenario_table
    ).
    DATA(line) = usr_scenario_table[ 1 ].

    DATA: ls_message TYPE symsg.

    MESSAGE e000(ZPM_MO_US_MG) INTO DATA(lv_msg).
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING sy TO ls_message.

    ls_message-msgv1 = 'Errror in App'.

    IF eo_message IS NOT BOUND.
      eo_message = /bobf/cl_frw_factory=>get_message( ).
    ENDIF.

    eo_message->add_message(
      EXPORTING
        is_msg       = ls_message
        iv_node      = is_ctx-node_key
        iv_key       = it_key[ 1 ]-key
    ).

    APPEND VALUE #( key = it_key[ 1 ]-key ) TO et_failed_key.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

According to this UI5 Documentation there are two possible solutions for that:

  • Make Message Persistent
  • Defer read Operation after POST 

Topic 1: I have no idea how to make this message persistent, there is no parameter in the Message Object for that

Topic 2: I have set Attribute refreshAfterChange already to false in manifest.json file in BAS, Errors are still not displayed

 

Another User did have a similar Problem described here and solved it by addressing Importing Parameter "iv_message_target" to '/#TRANSIENT#'. But he did use another Message Container and probably had ODATA Service and not BOPF so its's not applicable for me.

Anyone got a hint?

EDIT:

After a bit of trial and error I tried deleting the selected line, Result was that i was successful and the List Report was automatically refreshed, so the above named attribute in manifest.json seems not to take effect in my Model.

SAP Fiori for SAP ERP

entry.title: Pre-check "Complete assigned notifications" on "Find maintenance order" app
entry.content:
Hello,

while doing completion of orders using button available on above ribbon on "Find maintenance order" app, checkbox for completing assigned notifications is not pre-checked.

Since this is a Fiori Standard, my colleague fiori consultant is not aware of how these changes can be performed. How can they perform it?

Is there a way to have this checkbox checked by default in this new app?

Thank you.

entry.title: Pick Outbound Delivery - deliveries containing items with batches
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm extending this app:
Pick Outbound Delivery

Our requirement is to enhance method EXCLUDE_INVALID_DELIVERIES class CL_LE_ODATA_COMMON called by DELIVERYHEADER_GET_ENTITY and change the error message text to make it more meaningful.

 

Can you help me? I need to enhance standard SAP message or add another message to et_bapi_messages.

 Can you please advise how to do that?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: [ODataMetadata] initial loading of metadata failed - execute locally from VS code
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I developed a Fiori application in Visual Studio code and deployed to SAP system, configured in Fiori launchpad where I am able to run it successfully.

But the same application when executed locally from VS code (http://localhost:8080/index.html?sap-client=400&sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false), I am getting the below error. 

I was not able to figure out what I am missing. Maybe some proxy setup or something? Please let me know. Appreciate your response.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: SAP UI5: Analytical Page. Issue Measure Role not work correct
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I had a problem when configure Chart for SAP UI5 in CAP App. Below is my annotation, stock value I was setting is Axis2 but after render It always display Axis 1.

I checked in metadata file it also return correct role Axis2

And Chart in UI not display as expected. How can I fix it?

Thanks.

entry.title: Multi Dimensional Reports have missing variants Post Upgrade to 2023 from 2019 of the SAP S4 systems
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am facing issue with the Variants after migration to S/4 HANA.

Multi Dimensional Reports have missing variants

Post Upgrade to 2023 from 2019 of the SAP S4 systems, the Variants in the report are missing.

 

For the reports to be compatible, we had to migrate the custom reports from existing ‘Design Studio’ template to ‘WebDynpro’ template as suggested by SAP.

 

Report in Production Env

 

Selection Screen

 

Report opens in Design Studio Template (As prod is yest to be upgraded)

 

When we go to Manage Views, the Variant is available.

 

 

WHEREAS

In the Upgraded Pre-Production Environment

For the same report in Pre-Production

 

 

If I check the Variants, only the standard variant is available

 

Did anyone faced the same issue. Please share your feedback.

entry.title: Material Group Hierarchy not showing up in custom analytical query
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm facing a challenge and it will be very helpful if any of you can help me with the same.

The problem statement is: "We have defined a material group hierarchy in the Manage Global Hierarchy tile but it is not showing up in the Spend Analysis query. We need to ensure that when the user runs the Spend Analysis query, adds material group field in the row, they should get an option to go to hierarchy option, select a predefined hierarchy and the data should now be shown based on this hierarchy."

We have tried a few methods but none of them are working. The option to select hierarchy is not appearing. 

Please provide relevant solutions as soon as possible.

entry.title: Issue when deploying simple app to BTP using 'cf push'
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

I’m new to BTP apps, and honestly, I’m about to lose it—so I really hope someone can help!

I’m using BAS (Business Application Studio) in case that’s relevant. My goal is simple: deploy a basic Fiori app with a blank page that displays a list of data from a web service. Everything works fine when running it in BAS for testing.

I’ve explored BTP in the past, but due to the complexity around deployments, manifests, YAML files, routes, and MTA, I put it on hold until things hopefully became more stable. Now, I’m trying again and facing deployment issues.

The Problem:

I attempted to deploy the app using cf push. I also tried using MTA, but for some reason, the HTML5 app is not being deployed. The ultimate goal is to add this app to S/4HANA Cloud Public via Launchpad.

When checking the logs with:

 

cf logs <prj_name> --recent

 

I see the following errors (in red):

 

   2025-02-13T06:10:09.11+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR sh: 1: tsc: not found
   2025-02-13T06:10:09.12+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR npm notice
   2025-02-13T06:10:09.12+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR npm notice New major version of npm available! 10.7.0 -> 11.1.0
   2025-02-13T06:10:09.12+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR npm notice Changelog: https://github.com/npm/cli/releases/tag/v11.1.0
   2025-02-13T06:10:09.12+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR npm notice To update run: npm install -g npm@11.1.0
   2025-02-13T06:10:09.12+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR npm notice

 

It seems there are two major issues here:

1. TSC (TypeScript Compiler) not found

2. NPM version inconsistency

 

What I’ve Tried (Without Success)

1️⃣Fixing the tsc: not found Issue

Modified package.json to move TypeScript from devDependencies to dependencies:

 

Modify package.json
"dependencies": {
  "typescript": "^5.2.2"  // Añádelo aquí
},
"devDependencies": {
  
}

 

Installed TypeScript globally:

 

npm install typescript

 

Added a post-install script in package.json:

 

"scripts": {
"postinstall": "npm install -g typescript"
}

 

Verified TypeScript installation: 

 

npx tsc --version #returns 5.7.3

 

Despite all of this, cf push still throws the tsc: not found error.

 

2️⃣Fixing the NPM Version Issue

Updated NPM with:

 

npm install -g npm@11.1.0

 

However, running npm -v still shows the old version.

To fix this, I tried:

 

export PATH=$(npm prefix -g)/bin:$PATH

 

After this, npm -v shows the correct version (11.1.0).

But the errors still persist exactly the same after redeployment.

 

3️⃣ Other Things I’ve Tried (Also Failed)

✅Specified the Node.js version in package.json:

 

"engines": {
    "node": "20.x"
  }​

 

✅Created a manifest.yml to reduce memory size (not directly related but worth trying).

✅Deleted the failed app to free up space in BTP.

✅Completely removed and reinstalled node_modules:

 

rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json
npm cache clean --force
npm install

 

Yet, nothing has worked.

I’ve already gone through these articles, but they didn’t solve my issue:

• 🔗 Tips for Running CAP Node.js in SAP BTP

• 🔗 Error While Deploying CAP Project to CF Trial

My Questions

1. How can I ensure Cloud Foundry uses the correct Node.js and NPM versions during deployment?

2. Why does cf push fail with tsc: not found even though TypeScript is installed globally?

3. What’s the proper way to deploy a simple Fiori app (HTML5) to BTP and register it in S/4HANA Cloud Public via Launchpad?

I’d really appreciate any guidance—thanks in advance! 🚀

entry.title: Restricting Enterprise Search - S_ESH_CONN
entry.content: Trying to restrict the enterprise search in Fiori but is getting bypassed by something, could be a parameter setting? S_ESH_CONN was already restricted to select connector ID's, no other roles provides this object.

entry.title: Issue with Enter Event in Fiori GUI Apps (MIGO, MM03)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are facing an issue in Fiori with the GUI apps MIGO, MM03

When entering a material number in the selection screen (or in MIGO's material field) and pressing Enter, nothing happens. In the SAP GUI, this action triggers the Enter event, but when opening the same apps in Fiori, the event does not work.

The behavior is similar across different browsers.

When testing in incognito mode, the Enter event works in any of the apps—but only the first time. Within the same session, if we try the same action in a different app (or even reopen the same app a second time), the Enter event no longer works.

We have already cleared the browser cache, but this did not resolve the issue.

What could be causing this problem? Is there any way to prevent this behavior?

Thank you,
Veronika

entry.title: F1519 "Schedule Billing Creation" app: can a custom field (e.g. invoice value) be added?
entry.content:
I would like to add a custom field to the invoice data selection criteria of the app F1519 "Schedule Billing Creation". The goal is to only pick documents with value zero and create billing documents automatically.

The selection criteria looks like a "Fiorized" VF06 which from my GUI-days experience could only be extended via enhancement points. Also SAP Guided Answers say that the app has the type "SAP Fiori: Generic Job Scheduling Framework" which cannot be extended. However, in the Extensibility section of the Fiori Reference library the option "Extensibility via SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects" is mentioned. 

Does anybody have an experience extending such Fiori apps?

entry.title: one custom ui5 app from SAP BTP hits multiple s4hana on-premise client(100,200,200)
entry.content:
Dears,

I have one use case, I have created one custom ui5 using SAP BTP BAS and deployed to SAP BTP. Custom UI5 app uses destination service and cloud connector to consume OData from s4hana on premise system. In destination i have mentioned property client = 100 .

We have multiple clients in our on prem S/4 system.

Custom UI5 app(BTP) --> Client 100(on-prem S/4)

Custom UI5 app(BTP) --> Client 200(on-prem S/4)

Custom UI5 app(BTP) --> Client 300(on-prem S/4)

I want to run all 3 clients simultaneously from one custom ui5 app deployed to sap btp. is there any way to do?

entry.title: Different timeout for the same report in Fiori
entry.content:
Greetings!
In the Fiori Launchpad customized tile that launches a custom GUI report.
The report opens in a new tab and takes 40 minutes to run. The report is running successfully.
The user launches the same report in a new tab. But it doesn't finish and after 10 minutes goes back to the main screen Fiori Launchpad. What can explain this behavior of the Fiori application?

entry.title: Schedule job on Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

 

I like many reports on Fiori I for example Contract Expiry, off-contract spend.

pls see attached.

how can I schedule job on Fiori to run daily.

entry.title: Fetch List of Fiori apps from a given CDS view
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I have a scenario to find out the list of Fiori apps that uses a specific custom CDS view exposed as ODATA service

Is there any way that I can find the relevant Fiori applications by a given custom CDS name?

Any suggestion will be helpful here. Thanks in advance

Regards,

RM
